section_subtitle: Your journey to owning a piece of timeless elegance

steps.title: Send Us The Styles
steps.description: You can browse our website to select items. Alternatively, you can send us a photo of the jewelry you’d like to purchase directly via WhatsApp. We’ll check the price for you right away.

steps.title: Pay Deposit or Full
steps.description: 30% deposit to start production or pay in full

steps.title: Wait For Production
steps.description: About 7-15 days for our artisans to create your piece

steps.title: Confirm & Approve
steps.description: We will send you pictures and videos for confirmation before shipment.

steps.title: Receive Your Jewelry
steps.description: Beautifully packaged and shipped to your door

cta_subtitle: Contact us through any of these channels
